query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: Two standing figures in an outdoor setting, one wearing a white or pale blue flowing garment with decorative elements and the other in a deep red or burgundy robe, with green foliage and warm light in the background suggesting a garden or natural environment.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Two standing figures in an outdoor garden setting, one in a pale flowing garment and the other in deep red, rendered with extreme motion blur that streaks the entire composition into vertical smears of color, faces and features dissolved into unrecognizable shapes, with blown-out highlights flooding the upper portion and edges of the frame, creating an abstract impression where only the suggestion of human forms and clothing colors remain visible through the haze and light.
